source_pr.title: ddl, parser: Implement the write-reorg state split task related functions, and the related interfaces of backfill worker
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/37123

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

- Implement the write-reorg state split task-related functions and check the backfill jobs are finished.
- Implement 5 related interfaces of backfill workers：
```
  	GetTask() (*BackfillJob, error)
	UpdateTask(bJob *BackfillJob) error
	FinishTask(bJob *BackfillJob) error
	GetCtx() *backfillCtx
	String() string
```

- Adjust the parameters of related functions and structures.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No explicit flaky failure signature is described in the PR or reflected in the patch; the changes are primarily a DDL backfill job refactor (splitting backfill jobs / updating job table APIs) plus test expectation updates.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (feature/refactor + test updates).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a broad DDL refactor (split backfill jobs / reorg task handling) that updates job table logic and adjusts multiple tests accordingly. The patch does not contain a concrete flaky failure signature nor a targeted stabilization change that can be confidently tied to a specific flaky symptom, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Refactor DDL backfill job/task handling and update tests; no targeted flaky stabilization evidence in patch.

evidence: evidence: condition := fmt.Sprintf("exec_ID = '' or exec_lease < '%v' and ddl_job_id = %d order by ddl_job_id", currTime.Add(-instanceLease), jobID2) (ddl/job_table_test.go)

files: ddl/backfilling.go, ddl/column.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/ddl_workerpool_test.go, ddl/index.go, ddl/index_merge_tmp.go, ddl/ingest/engine_mgr.go, ddl/job_table.go, ddl/job_table_test.go, ddl/partition.go, ddl/reorg.go, ddl/util/util.go, executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/ddl_test.go, parser/model/ddl.go
